title: Resolve 7 documented pipeline doc conflicts in-place
description: Fix all 7 conflicts from brainstorm.md by editing existing pipeline docs. Each conflict has a specified resolution direction below.

scope.in: Edit 6 existing pipeline docs to resolve the 7 conflicts. Each fix is a small in-place edit following the resolution direction specified in each task.
scope.out: Creating new files. Restructuring docs. Trimming content (that is project 2). Adding enforcement scripts (that is project 3).

dod.criterion: All 7 conflicts have before/after diffs showing the contradiction removed
No new files created — all edits in existing docs
Pipeline step order in SKILL.md is consistent with all doc references

tasks.title: Fix conflict #1: lightweight routing contradiction (HIGH)
tasks.user_scenario: Agents running lightweight directives no longer get contradictory instructions about whether COO planning runs.
tasks.scope: RESOLUTION: COO plans for ALL weights including lightweight. Fix 07b-project-brainstorm.md line 86-87 which says 'Lightweight directives skip this step entirely -- they have no COO plan'. Change to: 'Lightweight directives auto-derive tasks from the COO plan without spawning a separate CTO + builder decomposition.' Also verify 00-delegation-and-triage.md is consistent (it already says COO plans for all weights).

dod.criterion: 07b-project-brainstorm.md no longer says lightweight has 'no COO plan'
07b-project-brainstorm.md says lightweight auto-derives tasks from COO plan
00-delegation-and-triage.md and 07b are consistent on lightweight routing

tasks.title: Fix conflicts #2 and #3: brainstorm timing + status lifecycle
tasks.user_scenario: Agents know exactly when brainstorm runs relative to planning, and what status values are valid for directives.
tasks.scope: CONFLICT #2 RESOLUTION: Add explicit note in 07b-project-brainstorm.md that brainstorm (step 6) runs BEFORE COO plan (step 8). Reference SKILL.md pipeline table. CONFLICT #3 RESOLUTION: Add a 5-line status lifecycle in directive-json.md schema: planned → active → awaiting_completion → completed | reopened | cancelled. Just a comment block, not a new section.

dod.criterion: 07b-project-brainstorm.md has explicit note about brainstorm running before COO plan
directive-json.md has status lifecycle comment (5 lines max)

tasks.title: Fix conflicts #4, #5, #6: DOD verification, code-review blocking, audit timing
tasks.user_scenario: Reviewers verify DOD (not builders), code-review failures block progress, and COO plans with audit data.
tasks.scope: CONFLICT #4 RESOLUTION: Add instruction in 09-execute-projects.md review section: 'Update project.json DOD from the REVIEWER output, not builder self-assessment.' CONFLICT #5 RESOLUTION: Add in phase-definitions.md code-review section: 'If code_review_outcome = fail: stop, re-spawn builder with findings, re-run code-review. Max 1 fix cycle. If still failing, log and proceed to review.' CONFLICT #6 RESOLUTION: Add note in 05-planning.md: 'The COO receives audit findings as input. If audit reveals complexity exceeding triage estimate, COO should flag in challenges.risks.'

dod.criterion: 09-execute-projects.md review section says DOD comes from reviewer output not builder
phase-definitions.md has code-review failure blocking logic (max 1 fix cycle)
05-planning.md mentions COO receives audit findings as input

tasks.title: Fix conflict #7: project.json update instruction buried (HIGH)
tasks.user_scenario: Agents see the project.json update instruction prominently, not buried at line 397.
tasks.scope: RESOLUTION: In 09-execute-projects.md, promote the project.json update instruction to a prominent callout near the top of the task execution loop. Use bold text and a clear heading like '### CRITICAL: Update project.json After Each Task'. Keep the existing instruction text, just move/duplicate it to a visible position.

dod.criterion: project.json update instruction appears within the first 50 lines of the task execution section
Instruction uses bold/heading formatting for visibility
